summary: The diff implements photo upload functionality for car price prediction across frontend and backend. REQ-1 (form photo upload with previews), REQ-3 (history thumbnails), and REQ-4 (mutation hook updates) appear well-implemented. REQ-2 has a notable concern: the backend uses ExternalBlob/Storage rather than base64-encoded text as required by the constraint, and the migration.mo uses Storage.ExternalBlob instead of ?[Text]. However, photo data is persisted and backwards-compatible. One hallucinated feature is detected: a migration module was added that was not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Store uploaded car photo data as base64-encoded blobs using ?[Text] for base64 strings in the backend — no external storage services
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo defines photos as ?[Storage.ExternalBlob] and useQueries.ts converts files to ExternalBlob instances via ExternalBlob.fromBytes(). The constraint explicitly requires base64-encoded text (?[Text]) and forbids external storage services. The implementation appears to use a blob storage module (Storage.ExternalBlob / MixinStorage) rather than plain base64 text strings.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend/migration.mo module was added to migrate existing prediction records from OldCarSpecs to NewCarSpecs (with photos=null for existing records).
hallucinated_features.reason: No migration module was requested in the build request. The requirements only asked to update CarSpecs type and ensure backwards compatibility; an explicit Motoko migration module was not specified.
